title: Planet Fitness stock plunges 30% after company slashes guidance, cancels planned price hikes
summary: Shares of Planet Fitness plunged Thursday after the fitness company slashed its guidance and canceled planned price hikes.

title: Healthy Returns: First Ozempic generics in Canada will be a test case for Novo Nordisk
summary: New generics in Canada likely mark the start of a decline in international revenue of semaglutide, the active ingredient in Novo's Ozempic and Wegovy.
